allies.rationale_text: Decision-trees helps category-decisions separate cases and consequences before the rule is locked in.
allies.source_quote: decision trees are tools used to cleave a problem into insightful parts

allies.rationale_text: Checklists strengthens category-decisions by turning stable boundaries into repeatable operational moves instead of ad hoc improvisation.
allies.source_quote: stable decision rule rather than case-by-case improvisation

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias distorts category-decisions when the bucket is defended for political comfort instead of evidence.
antagonists.source_quote: predisposition to defend existing beliefs or mental models

structured_tensions.tension_text: Category-decisions conflicts with representativeness-bias when labels are assigned from salient traits instead of distributional evidence.
structured_tensions.source_quote: category-decisions vs representativeness-bias: labels are assigned from salient traits instead of distributional evidence.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Category-decisions conflicts with first-principles-thinking when inherited buckets replace decomposition of underlying mechanisms.
structured_tensions.source_quote: category-decisions vs first-principles-thinking: inherited buckets replace decomposition of underlying mechanisms.

curation_notes.summary: Relation surface stays inside the current graph vocabulary and keeps omission stronger than weak forcing.
donor_drops: Did not widen Wave 3 target ids or import donor-shaped relation neighborhoods to rescue weak local grounding.
open_questions: Some source-real neighbors remain omitted because the current graph vocabulary would force weaker mappings than this conservative pass allows.

allies: Wave 4 candidacy remains observational only and is noted only in batch artifacts.
antagonists: No multihop or higher-order semantics were introduced in these Wave 3 files.
structured_tensions: Explicit tensions were preserved only where the raw source clearly earned a current-vocabulary target.
